summary_ja: 2026-06-03のブログトリッジ結果。19記事中1件のtake（Microsoft MAI-Thinking-1/MAI-Code-1-Flash）、4件のreference（Simon Willisonのsandbox実験、Martin Aldersonのポッドキャスト、Gary MarcusのAI政策/経済論2件）、14件のskip。

decisions.title: datasette-agent-micropython 0.1a0
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ Simon WillisonがDatasette Agentの安全なコード実行基盤としてMicroPython WASM sandboxを試作。GPT-5.5がsandbox脱出失敗したことに言及。sandboxing-in-the-wildの実践例としてentityページへの追記候補。
decisions.body_excerpt:
# datasette-agent-micropython 0.1a0
Source: https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jun/2/datasette-agent-micropython/#atom-everything
I want
Datasette Agent
to be able to generate and execute Python code safely. This alpha is looking promising so far. GPT-5.5 has so far failed to break out of the sandbox!

decisions.title: I went on the Built for Turbulence podcast
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ Martin AldersonがポッドキャストでAIエージェントのソフトウェア経済学への影響を議論。5人vs500人の比較、Figma Trap、AIコード監査の必要性。entityページのRecent Activityセクションへの追記候補。
decisions.body_excerpt:
# I went on the Built for Turbulence podcast
Source: https://martinalderson.com/posts/built-for-turbulence-podcast/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=feed

decisions.title: Breaking: When dreams for AI sanity come true
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ Trump大統領がAIモデルの事前審査（preflight checks）に関する大統領令に署名。Marcusが3年前に上院で提案した内容と一致。AI安全性規制の進展としてentityページ追記候補。
decisions.body_excerpt:

decisions.title: Why things will eventually fall apart
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ Gary MarcusのAI経済批判最新版。Google増資調達、Bainの「The technology worked. The value didn't arrive」報告、Brad DeLongの経済分析を引用。既存entityのEnterprise Tokenmaxxing Backlashセクションに6月最新動向として追記候補。

decisions.title: micropython-wasm 0.1a1
decisions.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ バグフィックスリリース。blog-2でカバー済みのsandbox実験の一部。
decisions.body_excerpt:
# micropython-wasm 0.1a1
Source: https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jun/2/micropython-wasm/#atom-everything
Fixes for some limitations that emerged while I was trying to use this to build
datasette-agent-micropython
.

decisions.title: micropython-wasm 0.1a0
decisions.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ MicroPython WASMビルドのα版。blog-2でカバー済み。
decisions.body_excerpt:
# micropython-wasm 0.1a0
Source: https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jun/2/micropython-wasm-2/#atom-everything
My latest sandboxing experiment: This alpha package bundles a lightly customized WASM build of
MicroPython
with a wrapper to execute code in it via
wasmtime
.
